ar.appearance_prefs.accessibility_profile_d: Choose how the interface should adapt for easier reading, calmer motion, and simpler screens
ar.appearance_prefs.large_text_desc: Use the largest base text size across the interface
ar.appearance_prefs.reduced_motion_desc: Reduce animation and scrolling effects throughout the interface
ar.appearance_prefs.simplified_layout_desc: Reduce blur, shadows, and decorative depth while keeping the same navigation
ar.header.title: Settings
ar.identity.dob_body: We need your date of birth to verify it matches your government-issued ID.
ar.identity.error_create_payment: Failed to create payment. Please try again.
ar.identity.error_save_dob: Failed to save date of birth. Please try again.
ar.identity.failed_body: We were unable to verify your identity.
ar.identity.failed_hint: Please ensure your photo ID is clear, well-lit, and that your name and date of birth match your profile.
ar.identity.fee_body: Identity verification costs {{fee}}. This is a one-time fee — you won't be charged again if you need to retry.
ar.identity.in_progress_body: Please complete the verification in the opened window. This page will update automatically.
ar.identity.start_body: Submit your government-issued ID and a selfie to earn the ID Verified badge.
ar.identity.verified_body: Your identity has been verified. The ID Verified badge is now visible on your profile.
ar.identity_auth.please_login: Please log in to verify your identity.
ar.identity_verified_lock_dob: Your date of birth is locked because your identity has been verified.
ar.marketing_consent_confirm_body: Are you sure you want to receive occasional marketing emails, product updates, and community highlights? You can unsubscribe at any time.
ar.page_meta.title: Settings
ar.profile.identity_verified_lock: Your name is locked because your identity has been verified.
ar.push_campaign_opt_in_description: Allow local businesses and organisations to send you targeted push notifications. You can opt out at any time.
ar.push_status.denied: You have blocked notifications. Update your browser settings to re-enable.
ar.push_status.subscribed: You are subscribed on this device.
ar.push_status.unsupported: Your browser does not support push notifications.
ar.safeguarding.intro: Review or revoke the safeguarding preferences you set during onboarding. Your coordinators can see these but other members cannot.
ar.safeguarding.no_preferences: You have no active safeguarding preferences. You can set these at any time from the safeguarding help page.
ar.safeguarding.revoke_confirm_body: This preference will no longer apply to your account. Your coordinators will be notified of the change.
ar.safeguarding.revoke_error_toast: Something went wrong. Please try again.
ar.theme.title: Theme
ar.title: Settings
ar.unsaved_changes.message: You have unsaved changes. If you leave, your changes will be lost.
ar.unsaved_changes.title: Unsaved Changes

ga.appearance_prefs.accessibility_profile_d: Choose how the interface should adapt for easier reading, calmer motion, and simpler screens
ga.appearance_prefs.large_text_desc: Use the largest base text size across the interface
ga.appearance_prefs.reduced_motion_desc: Reduce animation and scrolling effects throughout the interface
ga.appearance_prefs.simplified_layout_desc: Reduce blur, shadows, and decorative depth while keeping the same navigation
ga.biometric.platform_android_step1: Tap "This device" to create a passkey using your fingerprint, face, or screen lock.
ga.biometric.platform_android_step2: The passkey is saved to Google Password Manager and works on all your Android devices and Chrome browsers.
ga.biometric.platform_android_step3: You can also tap "Phone, tablet, or security key" to register a security key.
ga.biometric.platform_ipad_step1: Tap "This device" to create a passkey using Face ID or Touch ID.
ga.biometric.platform_ipad_step2: The passkey is saved to iCloud Keychain and works on all your Apple devices.
ga.biometric.platform_ipad_step3: You can also tap "Phone, tablet, or security key" to register a security key.
ga.biometric.platform_iphone_step1: Tap "This device" to create a passkey using Face ID or Touch ID.
ga.biometric.platform_iphone_step2: The passkey is saved to iCloud Keychain and works on all your Apple devices.
ga.biometric.platform_iphone_step3: You can also tap "Phone, tablet, or security key" to register a security key.
ga.biometric.platform_linux_step1: Click "This device" — your browser will use its built-in passkey manager.
ga.biometric.platform_linux_step2: Or click "Phone, tablet, or security key" to use a USB security key or scan a QR code with your phone.
ga.biometric.platform_mac_step1: Click "This Mac" — your browser will prompt Touch ID or your Mac password.
ga.biometric.platform_mac_step2: The passkey syncs via iCloud Keychain to your iPhone, iPad, and other Macs automatically.
ga.biometric.platform_mac_step3: Or click "Phone, tablet, or security key" to register a different device.
ga.biometric.platform_unknown_step1: Click "This device" to create a passkey on the device you're using now.
ga.biometric.platform_unknown_step2: Or click "Phone, tablet, or security key" to register a different device.
ga.biometric.platform_windows_step1: Click "This PC" to create a passkey stored on this computer. You'll confirm with your Windows Hello PIN, fingerprint, or face.
ga.biometric.platform_windows_step2: Requirement: You must have Windows Hello set up first. Go to Windows Settings > Accounts > Sign-in options > PIN to set it up.
ga.biometric.platform_windows_step3: Or click "Phone, tablet, or security key" to scan a QR code with your phone instead.
ga.biometric.platform_windows_step4: To set up passkeys on your phone too, open this page on your phone and tap "This device".
ga.block_user.body: They won't be able to see your profile, message you, or interact with your content. Any existing connection will be removed.
ga.block_user.title: Block {{name}}?
ga.blocked_users.empty_desc: Users you block won't be able to see your profile, message you, or interact with your content.
ga.blocked_users.subtitle: Manage users you have blocked
ga.blocked_users.title: Blocked Users
ga.blocked_users.unblock_confirm_body: They will be able to see your profile and send you messages again. You will not be reconnected automatically.
